content.content: Reality star and real estate professional known for her role on Netflix'sSelling the OC. She also posts selfies, life updates, and lifestyle content on her alexhall_o.c Instagram where she has over 470,000 followers. A popular upload is a video of her doing makeup and chatting with her fans. It has gained over 150,000 views on Instagram. She posted her first Instagram picture in October 2021. In the photo, she is sunbathing with friends on the beach. She spoke with ET Online about how she was portrayed as the villain of Selling the OC through the show's editing. Among other things, she said, "to see it unfold that way, with the viewers who just don't know, and they're just seeing it for the first time and they don't know any of the behind the scenes like we did or we do...it's shocking. It's honestly just shocking." She has a son and a daughter. She worked withJason Oppenheim, owner of the Oppenheim Group, on the Netflix reality TV show, Selling the OC.
